summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LeadixAI content engine upgrade. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend functionality tested successfully with real AI integration (GPT-5.2) working for both carousel and poll generation. All platform selectors, design controls, and core features functioning as expected.
passed_tests: Backend health endpoint (GET /api/health)
Carousel generation for all 4 platforms (LinkedIn, Instagram, X/Twitter, TikTok)
Poll content generation for all 4 platforms
Slide regeneration endpoint
Error handling for invalid requests
Demo authentication working
Create Content page loading with both tabs
Platform selectors showing all 4 platforms including TikTok
Text input, video upload area, video URL input rendering
Generate button functionality with loading animations
Real AI carousel generation with GPT-5.2
Hook selection with 7 generated options
Carousel editor with slide editor, design controls, preview area
Design controls: 8 background styles, 5 fonts, 3 layouts, 2 sliders
Export buttons (current slide and all slides)
Poll Image Generator UI elements
Poll platform selectors (4 platforms)
Poll input and generate button functionality
Content history section implementation
Dashboard metrics and quick actions

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (minor session timeout issues during extended testing)
